title: My Friend's Little Sister Has It In for Me
overview: Akiteru just wants to work toward his future, but his friend's little sister won't allow him any peace.

title: The Cousin I Haven't Seen in Years Is Cold to Me
overview: Now that Mashiro has moved to his school, can Akiteru manage to make her open up to him?

title: Only I Can Be a Pain to My Uncle’s Daughter
overview: Akiteru decides to throw a welcome party for Mashiro, but first he must convince her to attend.

title: My Friend's Little Sister Might Be a Delinquent
overview: Akiteru and Iroha recall how they first met.

title: My Friend's Little Sister Keeps Getting Close to Me
overview: A look back at how Iroha came to be the voice actress for 05th Floor Alliance.

title: My Friend's Little Sister Has It In for My Friend's Enemy
overview: While at the mall with Mashiro and Iroha, Akiteru learns why Mashiro left her old school.

title: The Girl Who Confessed to Me Is Cold to Me in Reality
overview: Akiteru tries to give a proper reply to Mashiro's love confession, but she's brutally cold to him in person.

title: Everyone I Know Is Being Weird With Me
overview: Sumire asks Akiteru for help with a problem that could endanger her future with 05th Floor Alliance.

title: My Fake Girlfriend Gets Tough When I Respond To Her Confession
overview: Akiteru and Iroha head to Otoi's studio to record for the game, but Iroha has ideas of her own.

title: My Friend's Little Sister Only Gets an Apology from Me
overview: Akiteru must clear the air with Iroha to keep 05th Floor Alliance running smoothly.

title: We're Perfect for Training the Drama Club
overview: With 05th Floor Alliance's help, the drama club is ready for the big competition... but then disaster strikes.

title: My Friend's Little Sister Really Does Have It In for Me
overview: Can Akiteru save the drama club and secure 05th Floor Alliance's future?
